items.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.summary: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
items.title_original: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.title_en: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.summary_zh: 据报道，RTX 50 Super GPU 将使用的 3GB GDDR7 芯片的成本是普通 RTX 50 系列显卡上的 2GB 芯片的两倍到三倍。这可能会使这些 GPU 的零售价格远远超出 Nvidia 的目标建议零售价。

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.summary: ‘The Jensen Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend.
items.title_original: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.title_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.summary_zh: “Jensen 夹克”本周末的成交价为 96 万美元。

items.summary: Gameboy Advance port of hashcat allows for advanced password cracking in meager hardware — so long as you're willing to wait

items.title: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.summary: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
items.title_original: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.title_en: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.title_zh: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算有限的人的最后选择
items.title_bilingual: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算有限的人的最后选择 / AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.summary_zh: AGI AI828 是一款性能和能效均低于标准的预算驱动器。这使得它成为最后的手段，尽管在当前市场上，它对于某些人来说可能已经足够好了。

items.title: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
items.summary: There’s a new 'open to everyone' floppy disk-size game development competition with cash prizes for the best three submissions.
items.title_original: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format

items.summary_zh: 新推出了“向所有人开放”的软盘大小的游戏开发竞赛，提交的最佳三项作品将获得现金奖励。

items.title: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items.summary: A micro-drone designed to locate and eradicate mosquitoes has passed an important milestone with its first recorded air-to-air kill.
items.title_original: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items.title_en: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items.title_bilingual: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items.summary_zh: 一款旨在定位和消灭蚊子的微型无人机首次实现空对空消灭蚊子记录，这是一个重要的里程碑。

items.title_zh: 【新闻】台积电财报电话会议后：外资券商看到EUV驱动的资本支出激增和2027年价格上涨
items.title_bilingual: 【新闻】台积电财报电话会议后：外资券商看到EUV驱动的资本支出激增和2027年价格上涨 / [News] TSMC After Earnings Call: Foreign Brokerages See EUV-Driven CapEx Surge and 2027 Price Hikes

items.title: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
items.summary: ASML says that the increased productivity of its Low-NA EUV tools gives it an option to increase the prices of these scanners in the future. The move may have a drastic effect on TSMC's future expansion plans, as the foundry made a big bet on existing lithography systems.
items.title_original: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
items.title_en: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
items.title_bilingual: ASML's planned Low-NA EUV machine price hikes reportedly frustrate TSMC — lithography machine maker comes knocking to make bank on TSMC's profitable fabs, potentially costing the Taiwanese chipmaker billions
items.summary_zh: ASML 表示，其低数值孔径 EUV 工具生产率的提高使其可以选择在未来提高这些扫描仪的价格。此举可能会对台积电未来的扩张计划产生巨大影响，因为这家代工厂在现有的光刻系统上下了很大的赌注。

items.title: TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
items.summary: TSMC's A14 process technology progresses faster than N2 at this stage of development as developers of both client and AI/HPC plan to use it.
items.title_original: TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
items.title_en: TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
items.title_zh: 台积电确认 A14 更新中良率和性能显着提升——AI/HPC 和智能手机客户的浓厚兴趣
items.title_bilingual: 台积电确认 A14 更新中良率和性能显着提升——AI/HPC 和智能手机客户的浓厚兴趣 / TSMC confirms significant yield and performance improvements in A14 update — strong interest from AI/HPC and smartphone customers
items.summary_zh: 台积电的 A14 工艺技术在现阶段的发展速度比 N2 更快，因为客户端和 AI/HPC 的开发人员都计划使用它。
